narrative:
Wyandot County has 14,309 registered voters, with 52.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.5 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 30.7% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -12.2% D−R vs -39.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
